items.title: Continuous sensor classification
items.description: IoT pipelines use GNB on temperature, pressure, and vibration features to label equipment states — fast training and inference without GPU.

items.title: Biometric and health metrics
items.description: Height, weight, blood markers, and similar continuous vitals feed per-diagnosis Gaussian models for screening or triage baselines.

items.title: Botanical and agricultural QC
items.description: Petal dimensions, grain moisture, and soil chemistry measurements classify species or batch quality with interpretable per-class means.

items.title: Speech/audio simple features
items.description: Hand-crafted continuous descriptors (pitch, energy, MFCC means) can be classified with GNB before deep acoustic models.

items.title: Rapid tabular prototyping
items.description: Data scientists fit GaussianNB as a first generative baseline on numeric columns — especially when n is small and features are roughly Normal per class.
